meta.title: Generative AI bootcamp — Cercle IA
meta.description: 3 intensive sessions to master generative AI in your professional practice. Prompts, tools, methods, confidentiality. Online. 750 € excl. VAT.

course.name: Generative AI bootcamp
course.description: Intensive 3-session programme to master generative AI in your professional practice. Prompts, tools, methods and confidentiality.

hero.title: Master generative AI
hero.description: A 3-session programme to get concrete results: how to write your prompts, which AI tools to choose depending on the task, and how to work with AI without compromising confidentiality.

problemSolution.title: You use AI. But not the way you'd like to.
problemSolution.intro: This programme is designed for advisory professionals — lawyers, consultants, liberal professions, executives — who want to unlock AI's potential to get ahead and anticipate the inevitable transformation of their field.

rows.problem: You use ChatGPT or Copilot, but the results are not always reliable.
rows.solutionDesc: Learn to write precise instructions, tailored to your profession. When the prompt is right, so is the output.

rows.problem: You rephrase, retry, correct. The time saving never materialises.
rows.solutionDesc: Integrate AI into your processes with a structured method. Each session gives you a protocol you can apply the next day, not a list of features.

rows.problem: You don't know what you can share with AI without putting your client data at risk.
rows.solutionDesc: Identify what data to share with AI, which tools comply with your professional obligations and how to set up a confidential working environment.

pillars.title: Resources and tools
items: Guides to discover and master AI tools
Regular updates based on AI news

pillars.title: Ongoing support
items: Dedicated technical support in the member space
Expert community to share best practices

pillars.title: Concrete results
items: Implementation on your assignments from the first week

bonus.title: Cercle GPT — 3 months free
bonus.description: Access the best AI models from a single secure interface — without juggling subscriptions, without compromising your data confidentiality.

session.title: Septembre 2026.
session.description: Places are limited to guarantee the quality of exchanges. Join the waitlist to be notified first when registration opens.

items.pull: Highly recommended for anyone willing to get down to the brass tacks of this intriguing technology.
items.body: I recently completed five 2-hour AI training sessions. The program offered a detailed overview of key AI tools and provided very concrete, practice-oriented guidance.
items.name: Prescillia Algrain

items.body: J'ai suivi 3 formations de 2 heures cette année. Merci Tarik & Team !
items.name: Edouard Cambier

items.body: Parmi l'amas de formations disponibles, en voici une – enfin – concrète, sincère, pragmatique et utile à tous les indépendants (d'esprit ou de pratique).
items.name: Adam Tricha

trainer.name: Tarik Hennen.
trainer.bio: Former lawyer, digital strategy consultant, lecturer at IHECS, AI trainer at EPHEC and UCLouvain. AI practitioner since 2021 — in contexts where mistakes have a cost.
trainer.quote: The starting point is not the tool. It's the work.

items.question: Do I need technical AI skills?
items.answer: No. The bootcamp is designed for professionals with no technical background. Everything is explained in a concrete, business-oriented way — no technical jargon, no prerequisites.

items.question: How do the masterclass sessions work?
items.answer: Practical online sessions with exercises and business use cases. The goal is for each participant to leave with methods they can apply the next day.

items.question: How does the individual coaching session work?
items.answer: A 1-on-1 session with Tarik Hennen to adapt the learning to your specific context: your tools, your clients, your professional constraints.

items.question: What is the total investment?
items.answer: 750 € excl. VAT for the full programme — 3 masterclass sessions, individual coaching, access to the resource library and 3 months of Cercle GPT free. Invoicing available.

items.question: Is the bootcamp eligible for training grants?
items.answer: In Belgium, professional training may be eligible for support through sectoral funds. We provide a training certificate and the necessary documents. Contact us to check eligibility based on your situation.

items.question: Can I participate if I am outside Belgium?
items.answer: Yes. The bootcamp takes place entirely online and is open to French-speaking participants regardless of their country of residence. Sessions are scheduled during business hours (CET).

items.question: Is there follow-up after the bootcamp?
items.answer: Yes. You access the Cercle IA community for 3 months, and your free Cercle GPT subscription gives you access to regularly updated resources. Session replays are also included.

ctaFinal.title: Ready to take action?
ctaFinal.description: Join the waitlist for the next session or schedule a call if you would like to discuss a tailored solution.
